message:
feat(abi): add allocator stage-context helpers for check-ordering pipeline

Introduce three inline helper functions in the malloc ABI layer that
bridge the allocator surface to the membrane's runtime check-ordering
and outcome-recording system:

- stage_index(): looks up a CheckStage position within a 7-stage ordering
  array, used to determine early-exit points during validation
- allocator_stage_context(): computes alignment and page-residency
  hints from an address, then queries runtime_policy for the optimal
  check ordering for allocator operations
- record_allocator_stage_outcome(): feeds completed stage results back
  into the runtime policy feedback loop so future allocations can
  adapt their check ordering based on observed patterns

Also adds the CheckStage import from glibc_rs_membrane::check_oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
